name: Employee Salary Analysis Workflow
description: Create employee records, analyze salaries, and generate a summary report

tasks.name: Create Employee JSON File
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to create a file named 'employees.json'. The file MUST contain a JSON array of exactly 5 employee records. Each record MUST have three fields: 'name' (string), 'department' (string), and 'salary' (number). Use realistic employee data with varied salaries (between 40000 and 120000) and different departments (e.g., Engineering, Sales, Marketing, HR, Finance). Output format: Confirm the file was written and include the complete JSON content verbatim.
tasks.success_criteria: Output confirms 'employees.json' was created and shows the complete JSON array with exactly 5 employee objects, each containing name, department, and salary fields

tasks.name: Read File and Calculate Salary Statistics
tasks.description: You MUST call file_read to read 'employees.json' created in task_001. Then you MUST call python_exec to: (1) parse the JSON data, (2) calculate the average salary across all 5 employees, (3) identify the highest-paid employee (name, department, salary). Output the FULL calculation results verbatim, not a summary. Include: the complete employee list, the exact average salary (as a number), and the complete details of the highest-paid employee. Output format: JSON object with keys 'employees' (array), 'average_salary' (number), 'highest_paid_employee' (object with name, department, salary).
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains the raw file contents from employees.json AND a JSON object with 'average_salary' as a number and 'highest_paid_employee' as an object with all three fields

tasks.name: Write Salary Report Summary
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to create 'salary_report.txt'. Use the calculation results from task_002 to write a human-readable summary report. The report MUST include: (1) Total number of employees analyzed, (2) Average salary formatted as currency, (3) Highest-paid employee's name, department, and salary formatted as currency. Format the report as clear, professional text with appropriate headers and formatting. Do NOT invent numbers — use only the exact values from task_002's output.
tasks.success_criteria: Output confirms 'salary_report.txt' was created and contains references to the average salary and highest-paid employee data from task_002
